newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The most recent item is a May 2026 launch of low-noise 40mm DC San Ace fans; no AI-server-specific design win or guidance change in the window.

sources.label: Sanyo Denki San Ace product site

verdicts.rankRationale: Passives-vs-alpha lens: thesis intact and still under-followed — San Ace high-static-pressure fans gain content per rack as liquid cooling scales (sidecars/CDUs still need fans). Trades ~26x PE vs 80-180x cooling peers, no sell-side AI narrative. No news since June 9; nudge +1 on durable residual alpha.
verdicts.bull: Cheapest AI-cooling play (~26x vs peers 80-180x); fan content per rack rising with liquid-cooling sidecars; new low-noise fans extend product edge.
verdicts.neutral: Cooling buried in 3-segment conglomerate; no AI re-rating catalyst yet despite stock already doubling.
verdicts.bear: +68% YTD pulls forward upside; component-level winner with no direct contract disclosure; industrial cyclicality.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Recognition of San Ace AI-server fan content / re-rating toward thermal peers.
verdicts.primaryRisk: No AI narrative attaches; conglomerate discount persists.
